> **PRs are currently not accepted.** This PR will be closed automatically.
>
> We're in an issues-only period while v1 stabilizes. Please:
>
> 1. Close this PR.
> 2. Open an issue describing the change you'd like to see — use the [bug report](https://github.com/mazin-musleh/NDS-vanilla/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml) or [feature request](https://github.com/mazin-musleh/NDS-vanilla/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml) template.
> 3. Watch the repository for the announcement when PRs reopen.
>
> Thank you for your interest in NDS.
